use std::collections::VecDeque;

fn remove_zeros(data: &mut Vec<i32>) {
    data.retain(|x| *x != 0);
}

fn pop_front_items(queue: &mut VecDeque<String>) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut result = Vec::new();
    while let Some(item) = queue.pop_front() {
        result.push(item);
    }
    result
}

fn drain_matching(data: &mut Vec<u64>, threshold: u64) {
    data.retain(|x| *x >= threshold);
}

fn process_queue(items: &mut VecDeque<WorkItem>) {
    while let Some(item) = items.pop_front() {
        process_item(item);
    }
}

struct WorkItem { id: u64 }
fn process_item(_item: WorkItem) {}
